goal: Score a GitHub repository using the installed research-task-orchestrator skill, considering every file through bounded safe-read evidence and producing concrete improvement recommendations.
strategy: Prepare an every-file repository inventory and bounded context manifest, run a bounded meeting, then produce coverage, scorecard, improvement plan, and human report artifacts. The model must not load the whole repository into one prompt.

goal_plan.goal: Score a GitHub repository using bounded every-file evidence and produce improvement recommendations.

jobs.title: Verify every-file coverage
jobs.instruction: Create repo-score/file-coverage.json. Read repo_metadata.json, repository_inventory.json, file_context_manifest.json, and inventory shards. Confirm every inventoried file has a context status. Include total_files, inventory_files, context_manifest_files, all_files_considered, context_guard_actions, skipped_bytes summary, and limitations. Do not claim full raw repository loading; use safe-read evidence.
jobs.success_check: Coverage JSON exists and states every file was considered through inventory/context manifest evidence.

jobs.title: Create repository scorecard
jobs.instruction: Create repo-score/scorecard.json. Score the repository from 0 to 100 using categories: architecture, maintainability, testing, documentation, security, and developer_experience. Use evidence from every-file inventory, bounded_file_context.md, and file_context_manifest.json. Include at least five concrete recommendations and limitations.
jobs.success_check: Scorecard JSON exists with six categories, numeric overall score, and recommendations.

jobs.title: Write improvement plan
jobs.instruction: Create repo-score/improvement-plan.md. Provide at least five prioritized improvements for the repository. Each item must explain the problem, why it matters, and a practical first fix. Ground the plan in scorecard.json and the file coverage evidence.
jobs.success_check: Improvement plan exists and gives at least five actionable improvements.

jobs.title: Write human-readable scoring report
jobs.instruction: Create repo-score/report.md. Summarize the repository score, strongest areas, weakest areas, top improvements, safe-read coverage method, and limitations. Make clear every file was considered via inventory/context manifest and that large files were bounded to avoid token overflow.
jobs.success_check: Report exists and is understandable to a user reviewing the GitHub repository scoring result.

jobs.title: Summarize repository scoring result
jobs.instruction: Create summary.md with 3 short bullets and one takeaway sentence. Summarize the repository scoring package, the generated outputs, the safe-read/every-file coverage method, and the main limitation.
evidence_requirements: score package outputs, safe-read method, limitation
jobs.success_check: summary.md gives a concise human-readable result for the dashboard.
